transcript.text:
[Peking Duck]
[Best of best Chinese dish]
[For Tzuyang]
[Are you guys ready for Peking Duck?]
Hello everyone
I'm here near the express terminal
I was wondering what I should eat next for my mukbang
And I saw Peking Duck on a blog.
It looked delicious so I had to pay a visit
It's a classy restaurant located next to a hotel
Let's go
[Mott 32] [Seoul, Seocho-gu]
So luxurious
Can I enter?
-Hello -Hello.
[Welcome to Mott 32]

[Very cool and neat interior design]
I made a reservation a week prior
Peking duck is reservations only that's why
So excited What now?
Menu first
So many items I don't know what's what
Look at all these menus
I have to eat the Peking Duck
Their dim sum look great too (steamed dumplings) I'll have some of that too
Hello.
-Do I order the fried rice at the end? -You can go ahead and order it now if you want
This is the dim sum menu
These are all dim sum
Well then... 2 orders of everything, please
-2 orders? -Yes
2 orders of all 5 dim sums

So that's 10 plates
Peking duck And Iberico Char Siu, please
[Peking Duck in Seoul!]
[Meal is served]
Not even big groups order like this
[It's coming!]
Really big
I'll prepare the char siu as well
[Shaking the sauce?]
Thank you
They will cut the duck for me in a bit
Let's start with the dim sum
It's going to be great Bon appetit
I ordered dim sum because I love them
But they have a lot of other dishes here
Really unique and everything But I went with dim sum today

They are known for their other dishes as well
Shanghai Xia Long Bao [Soup Dumpling]
Oh no the broth
Did you hear that?
The meat juice just bursts in your mouth
Fills my mouth with flavors
Shrimp dumplings
So chewy and meaty So good
I must try everything
[Checking the names]
Seafood Xiao Long Bao
It's red So cool
I can taste some herbs
It's so juicy
Juiciest Xiao Long Bao I've ever had
Char siu too

I should request for the duck now
Where's the bell?
[Hidden under the plates]
Duck, please
It's just the skin here Just like pork skin
Dip in sugar
Thank you
I will bring flour papers for the wraps
The skin is incredibly crispy
So delicious
Almost like chips
But full of duck grease
Very savory
Almost like scorched rice
Surprisingly really good with sugar
How can it be this crispy?

This is just what I like
Thank you
[Wrap for the duck meat]
They took the rest of the meat
You get to choose if you want fried rice with it or you can have it as it is
Yum
Put the meat on top like this
Dip the sauce
3 pieces
scallions
No cucumbers
It's a very thin flour wrap
[So focused].
I'll just use chopsticks
I love fine dining like this
It's really great

Tasty
[Black truffle quail dumplings]
A very strong truffle smell
And it has boiled. quail egg inside
So juicy It's no joke
I'm a dim sum lover
I've fallen in love
The skin is really crispy
The outside...
Thin and crispy
It's my first time having Peking Duck
So I was very worried that it won't suit my taste
But it doesn't taste gamey at all
It's a well-cooked duck
I feel like everyone would enjoy this
This is like tortilla

Some sugar for the skin
That hurts me so much
Oh no
It still has a lot of soup inside
Full of juice
Let's try wrapping this one
Iberico wrap
This sauce...
A sweet oyster sauce?
It's like a sweet oyster sauce
I personally think that their Xiao Long Bao is the best
Then scallops
These have a very unique smell
Hello
What is that?
-We have a dish on the house for you -On the house? You don't have to... Thank you!

It's a truffle dish
With sea cucumber, shrimp, abalone, scallops
Thank you so much
[Enjoy]
Would you like to order anything else?
-Do you have dessert? -Of course
Egg tart
Thank you
Enjoy your meal
Oh right, I have the peking duck fried rice
Can I get the fried rice right now?
-Yes -Thank you
I learned this from Wolfgang Steakhouse
[She knows how to do it now]
Smells so good
So tasty

It's good
It's a jumbo shrimp
Fried rice?
Thank you
I didn't order too much food today
I will just eat a little bit today because we're at a classy restaurant
I can't be eating too much at these types of restaurants
This isn't a spoon It's used to scoop food to your plate
But I really want it
I want to use it as a spoon at home
-Steal it -Say what now?
Take it
Don't say that!
[Should I?]
A lot of duck meat in here Looks delicious
What? What's so crunchy?

Egg tart Thank you
I will eat 1 right now
I was going to save it for last but I can't resist Everything came out right now because they're doing last call soon
This is what egg tarts are supposed to be like?
It has like pudding? steamed egg? inside Instead of cream
Mushroom
Yummy
Xiao long bao is the best
How can fried rice be this crispy?
This place looks so fancy It's a great place for special occasions
It's located right next to the hotel
So it's on the pricier side
A pretty nice spot to celebrate an anniversary or something
1,000 days? 10,000 days?
Do people celebrate their wedding anniversary the day of their wedding or the day of the marriage registration?
Wedding day...

Not registration?
Then that's marriage registration anniversary
That's right
Time for some dessert
So good
The inside almost feels like a pudding or steamed egg
It's not like cream cheese
I will eat the other 2 egg tarts on my way home
I want to take some time to eat the last pieces
Eat the crumbs you left on your hair too
Here?
Thanks everyone! [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
